# KakaoTalk Theme MCP

> Local MCP server and guide set for illustrators, character artists, designers, and developers creating KakaoTalk iOS and Android themes.

KakaoTalk Theme MCP helps creators identify required KakaoTalk theme assets, understand where each icon or image is used, validate Android theme resources, validate iOS theme folders, and package iOS `.ktheme` files.

## Primary Audience

- Korean illustrators
- character artists
- KakaoTalk theme creators
- digital goods creators
- designers preparing chat theme assets
- developers packaging iOS and Android KakaoTalk themes

## Key Use Cases

- Find required KakaoTalk theme icon filenames.
- Understand where each KakaoTalk theme asset appears.
- Prepare iOS `@2x` and `@3x` PNG assets.
- Prepare Android `drawable-*`, `mipmap-*`, and `.9.png` assets.
- Validate Android KakaoTalk theme projects.
- Package iOS KakaoTalk themes into `.ktheme` files.

## Core Documents

- [README](README.md): Main setup guide, asset checklist, FAQ, and MCP usage.
- [iOS design guide](design.md): iOS KakaoTalk theme design guidelines.
- [Android design guide](android/design.md): Android KakaoTalk theme design guidelines.
- [Illustrator onboarding](docs/for-illustrators.md): Guide for illustrators and character artists.
- [FAQ](docs/faq.md): Direct Q&A for creators and answer engines.
- [Discoverability notes](docs/discoverability.md): SEO, GEO, and AEO targeting notes.
- [MCP server](mcp/kakaotalk_theme_mcp.py): Local stdio MCP server implementation.

## MCP Tools

- `read_theme_guide`: Read iOS, Android, or dual-platform guide content.
- `create_theme_brief`: Create a fillable KakaoTalk theme brief.
- `list_required_assets`: List required iOS/Android icons and images.
- `validate_android_theme`: Validate an Android KakaoTalk theme project or APK.
- `validate_ios_theme`: Validate an iOS KakaoTalk theme folder or `.ktheme`.
- `package_ios_ktheme`: Package an iOS theme folder into a `.ktheme`.
- `list_theme_assets`: List local repository theme assets.
